title: hieracium murorum subsp. minutulescens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. minutulescens, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. minutulescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
